name: PLD Rives-Defénse
title: PLD - Rives-Défense
overview:
Paris La Défense is located northwest of central Paris in the Île-de-France region and has developed over more than sixty years into one of Europe’s most significant business districts with a strong international presence. Beyond its role as a major economic hub, the district is also a highly connected urban environment where employees, residents, students and visitors interact throughout the year. PLD Rives-Défense represents one of the most significant opportunities for transformation within La Défense in the coming years.

Led by RSHP, the team brings complementary expertise to this major urban project, comprising Atelier SOIL (urban planners), Altitude 35 (landscape architects), Arcadis (urban and civil engineers), Atelier Franck Boutté (environmental engineering), Urban Eco (specialists in urban ecology) and Mobius (specialists in reuse and recycling).

The proposal focuses on restoring the district’s historic relationship with the River Seine by introducing new access points and reopening long-obscured views towards the water that are currently blocked by infrastructure and fragmented urban layers. Alongside this reconnection to the river, the project seeks to reconnect the neighbourhood with the ground through generous planting and the creation of new public squares, establishing a bioclimatic refuge that improves environmental comfort and biodiversity.

The strategy builds upon the existing urban fabric by prioritising addition, rehabilitation and reuse. This approach strengthens the site’s identity, rooted in its architectural heritage and local community, while allowing for thoughtful intensification. Carefully integrated new buildings will support a greater diversity of uses, enhance everyday vibrancy and promote a renewed urbanism of proximity, reshaping both the image and experience of the neighbourhood. The project will be developed through a partnership-based approach, bringing together public and private stakeholders in an ongoing process of dialogue, collaboration and collective ambition.
